CellularRoleEnum.description: Functional role of organism in microbial community
CellularRoleEnum.title: CellularRoleEnum

ChemicalEntityTerm.description: A CHEBI term representing a chemical entity
ChemicalEntityTerm.title: ChemicalEntityTerm

CofactorDescriptor.description: A cofactor or coenzyme required for enzymatic activity

ec_associations.description: EC numbers of enzymes using this cofactor

CofactorDescriptor.title: CofactorDescriptor

can_biosynthesize.description: Whether organism can synthesize this cofactor

confidence.description: Confidence level (0.0-1.0) based on genome annotation

genes.description: Genes related to biosynthesis or utilization

Dataset.description: Omics dataset generated using this medium

dataset_type.description: Type of omics data (genomics, transcriptomics, metabolomics, etc.)

Dataset.title: Dataset

EvidenceItem.description: Evidence supporting a claim about media formulation or performance

explanation.description: Why this evidence supports the claim

snippet.description: Exact quote from paper (if PMID/DOI available)

EvidenceItem.title: EvidenceItem

GTDBTerm.description: A GTDB genome identifier. id = GTDB accession (e.g. GTDB:RS_GCF_000006945.2), label = full GTDB lineage string (e.g. d__Bacteria;p__Proteobacteria;...)
GTDBTerm.title: GTDBTerm

IngredientDescriptor.description: Chemical or biological ingredient in a medium

notes.description: Preparation notes specific to this ingredient

term.description: CHEBI term for the chemical entity

IngredientDescriptor.title: IngredientDescriptor

IngredientRoleEnum.description: Functional role of an ingredient in growth medium
IngredientRoleEnum.title: IngredientRoleEnum

MediaRecipe.description: A complete growth medium formulation for culturing microorganisms. This is the root entity - one per YAML file.

aeration.description: Gas exchange method (e.g., "0.5% CO2 in air", "bubbling", "shaking at 150 rpm")

categories.description: All categories this recipe appears in (for cross-category merges)

culture_vessel.description: Recommended culture container (e.g., "Erlenmeyer flask", "test tube", "petri dish")

datasets.description: Omics datasets generated using this medium

description.description: Overview of the medium and its purpose

high_metal.description: Indicates media with total metal concentration above the 90th percentile threshold (≥1049.84 mM). Metals include Fe, Cu, Zn, Mn, Co, Ni, Mo, Se, W, V, Cr, Ca, Mg, K, Na. Based on automated concentration analysis of ingredient composition.

high_ree.description: Indicates media with total rare earth element (REE) concentration above the 90th percentile threshold (≥1030.48 mM). REEs include lanthanides (La, Ce, Pr, Nd, Pm, Sm, Eu, Gd, Tb, Dy, Ho, Er, Tm, Yb, Lu) plus Sc and Y. Based on automated concentration analysis of ingredient composition.

light_intensity.description: Light intensity for photosynthetic organisms (e.g., "50 µmol photons m⁻² s⁻¹")

light_quality.description: Light spectrum or wavelength (e.g., "cool white fluorescent", "red LED 660nm")

merge_fingerprint.description: SHA256 hash of ingredient set for deduplication tracking

merged_from.description: Original recipe IDs that were merged into this record

name.description: Human-readable medium name (e.g., "LB Broth", "M9 Minimal Medium")

organism_culture_type.description: Whether this medium targets a pure isolate culture or a mixed microbial community

original_name.description: Original name from source database before filename sanitization. May contain special characters like /, :, %, (, ), ', ", <, >, &, #, etc. This field preserves the exact name as it appears in the source database.

preparation_steps.description: Ordered steps to prepare the medium

salinity.description: Salt concentration for marine/brackish media (e.g., "35 ppt", "3.5%")

solutions.description: Pre-prepared stock solutions used as ingredients

synonyms.description: Alternate names from merged duplicate recipes

target_organisms.description: Organisms for which this medium is designed

MediaRecipe.title: MediaRecipe

MediaTypeDescriptor.description: Classification and authoritative database reference for the medium

preferred_term.description: Medium designation in source database (e.g., "DSMZ Medium 1", "LB")

MediaTypeDescriptor.title: MediaTypeDescriptor

MediaVariant.description: A variant or modification of the base recipe
MediaVariant.title: MediaVariant

OrganismCultureTypeEnum.description: Whether the medium targets a pure isolate or a mixed microbial community
OrganismCultureTypeEnum.title: OrganismCultureTypeEnum

evidence.description: Evidence supporting growth on this medium

gtdb_term.description: GTDB genome or lineage identifier (alternative to NCBITaxon)

OrganismTerm.description: An NCBITaxon term representing an organism
OrganismTerm.title: OrganismTerm

RecipeSynonym.description: An alternate name for a recipe from a specific source
RecipeSynonym.title: RecipeSynonym

SolutionDescriptor.description: A pre-prepared stock solution used as an ingredient

concentration.description: Working concentration when added to medium

preparation_notes.description: How to prepare the stock solution

SolutionDescriptor.title: SolutionDescriptor

pressure.description: Pressure in psi or kPa (for autoclaving)

TransporterAnnotation.description: Annotation of a transporter or transport system
TransporterAnnotation.title: TransporterAnnotation
